name: Caramel Ribbon Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, combine the dry cake mix and chopped nuts.
2. Stir in the evaporated milk and melted margarine until well mixed.
3. Spread half of the cake mixture into a greased 9 x 13-inch pan.
4. Bake at 350°F for 10 minutes.
5. Remove from oven; sprinkle with chocolate chips over the hot crust.
6. Drizzle with caramel topping.
7. Drop the remaining cake mixture over all the contents in the pan.
8. Return to oven and bake for an additional 20-25 minutes, or until set.
9. Allow the bars to cool while still warm.
10. Loosen the sides of the pan and cut into bars.
